_comment: PRECRIME runtime/API config sample. Copy to precrime_config.json and fill in API keys locally. Product/sales truth (company, pitch, trade, buyers, geography) lives in DOCS/VALUE_PROP.md -- never here.
_databaseFile_note: The ONE place that selects PRECRIME's SQLite DB. Change this line + restart to switch databases. Accepts a path relative to the project root (e.g. data/myproject.sqlite) OR an absolute path (e.g. C:/Users/Scott/.../leedz.sqlite).
_chromeScrape_note: true = background fb/ig SCRAPE workers drive your logged-in Chrome via the mcp-chrome bridge (:12306), in EVERY mode. Requires mcp-chrome-bridge + the extension. The bridge is single-client and the pipeline owns it: the conductor serializes browser workers to one at a time. The orchestrator has no chrome tools.
_workers_note: No workers block on purpose: orchestrator is chosen by the LAUNCHER, not config. precrime.bat sets PRECRIME_WORKER_* (Claude); goose.bat sets none -> conductor uses its goose defaults (goose run --instructions <skill>). Hardcoding gooseBin here would force one orchestrator on both paths. Conductor defaults cover pollMs/maxWorkers/port/skillsRoot.
